blended.narrative: Okemo is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 3,750 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 4" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Wednesday: light freezing rain, highs of 48°F.
Saturday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
